llm_context.description: This control checks whether Amazon S3 buckets have public access blocked.
llm_context.risk: If this setting is enabled, any policies or access control lists (ACLs) that grant public access to this bucket and the objects that it contains are blocked.
llm_context.remediation_recommendation_text: Enable S3 Block Public Access at the bucket level.
